name: Reagan Massey
awards: Proactive Leadership Award, Quality Assurance Excellence
bio: Reagan oversees site execution with a builder's perspective shaped by real-world framing and superintendent experience. He keeps scheduling, material flow, and trade coordination synchronized while maintaining strong client communication and mentoring developing field talent.
careerHighlights: Oversees daily field operations with disciplined superintendent planning.
Synchronizes trades, materials, and sequencing to sustain project momentum.
Builds trust through clear jobsite communication with clients and crews.
Mentors emerging field talent to strengthen long-term team capability.
funFact: Reagan is motivated by delivering quality work that earns repeat client trust.
certifications: Forklift, Scissor Lift, Snake Lift, CPR, Procore Certified
